professional_summary: Senior Software Engineer with over 10 years of experience leveraging PHP and frameworks like Laravel and Symfony to develop scalable and secure web applications. Proven ability to optimize systems, integrate RESTful APIs, and implement cloud-based solutions on AWS and Azure, enhancing performance and reducing operational costs. Expertise in Agile methodologies, DevOps practices with Docker and Kubernetes, and database management with MySQL. Committed to contributing to impactful projects and driving continuous improvement.
